title: Minimum Operations to Make the Array Increasing

testcases.input: nums = [1,1,1] Output: 3 Explanation: You can do the following operations: 1) Increment nums[2], so nums becomes [1,1,2]. 2) Increment nums[1], so nums becomes [1,2,2]. 3) Increment nums[2], so nums becomes [1,2,3].
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: You can do the following operations: 1) Increment nums[2], so nums becomes [1,1,2]. 2) Increment nums[1], so nums becomes [1,2,2]. 3) Increment nums[2], so nums becomes [1,2,3].
